title: polygala luenensis
intro: Polygala luenensis, also known as Lu En's Milkwort, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family and is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Polygala luenensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is typically prepared into herbal decoctions, infusions, or dried powders to treat a range of conditions, and it is also used in modern herbal preparations to support lung health.
